hooks.name: Block Agent Deploy Commands
hooks.description: Prevents Kiro from running astro build, wrangler deploy, or any deployment commands. Raj deploys manually.

action.prompt: RULE: You are FORBIDDEN from running any build or deploy commands. This includes: `astro build`, `npm run build`, `wrangler deploy`, `npm run deploy`, `npm run deploy:staging`, or killing the dev server for build purposes (`kill $(lsof -ti:PORT)` before a build). If you need something deployed to staging or live for testing, ASK Raj to do it manually and wait for confirmation. Only Raj deploys.
